overview: EscolaUI is a multi-tenant school management system with a separate platform admin panel and school-side panel. The platform admin manages tenant subscriptions, sends bulk payment reminders with in-app notifications to school admins, and views an audit log of all reminders sent.
features: Separate platform admin and school admin panels with distinct layouts and navigation
Subscription panel showing all tenants' billing status, plan, and payment dates
Bulk payment reminders with select-all or select-specific tenants
In-app notifications delivered to tenant admins when reminders are sent
Immutable reminder log with timestamp, recipient, message, and delivery status
16 school management modules: Admissions, Attendance, Fees, Students, Exams, Online Classes, ID Cards, Report Cards, Notifications, Teacher, HR & Payroll, and more
Role-based access control with per-role sidebar and route-level enforcement
Multi-tenant support with per-school branding and color themes
Demo mode for evaluation without backend connectivity
